candidate_problem_record.subject: 数学、物理、生物、化学
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The following cumulative graph gives the electricity demand of a certain town.The power plant that provides electricity to this town is capable of generating 12,000 kW daily. On what percent of days will the power plant not be able to meet the demand for electricity?

image field contains a PIL image object representation, not an extractable path or URL

normalized_value.rewritten_question_text: The following cumulative graph gives the electricity demand of a certain town. The power plant that provides electricity to this town is capable of generating 12,000 kW daily. On what percent of days will the power plant not be able to meet the demand for electricity?

agent_assessment.rationale: The question text is complete and clearly asks for the percent of days when demand exceeds 12,000 kW. The cumulative graph is legible enough to read the trend and estimate the needed value, so the expected answer is understandable.
